<?php /** * This file is part of the ramsey/uuid library * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @copyright Copyright (c) Ben Ramsey <ben@benramsey.com> * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/MIT MIT */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace Ramsey\Uuid\Nonstandard; use Ramsey\Uuid\Codec\CodecInterface; use Ramsey\Uuid\Converter\NumberConverterInterface; use Ramsey\Uuid\Converter\TimeConverterInterface; use Ramsey\Uuid\Uuid as BaseUuid; /** * Nonstandard\Uuid is a UUID that doesn't conform to RFC 9562 (formerly RFC 4122) * * @immutable * @pure */ final class Uuid extends BaseUuid { public function __construct( Fields $fields, NumberConverterInterface $numberConverter, CodecInterface $codec, TimeConverterInterface $timeConverter, ) { parent::__construct($fields, $numberConverter, $codec, $timeConverter); } }
